egress_path: agent -> localhost shim (ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:<port>) -> PlugBoard mTLS (curl --noproxy *) -> opus-4.7
grading: python -m swebench.harness.run_evaluation --dataset princeton-nlp/SWE-bench_Verified --split test --max_workers 4 --cache_level instance (network-isolated podman)

critical_env_per_arm.TS_PRUNE_METHOD: <method key> — selects the function in prune_methods.METHODS
critical_env_per_arm.MUST_UNSET: http_proxy https_proxy HTTP_PROXY HTTPS_PROXY no_proxy NO_PROXY all_proxy ALL_PROXY (inherited [::1] in no_proxy breaks litellm/httpx with 'Invalid port: :1]')

replay_per_method: TS_PRUNE_METHOD=<m> PB_SHIM_PORT=<port> PB_LEDGER=logs/ledger_<m>.jsonl python scripts/prune_shim.py &  THEN  bash scripts/run_arm.sh <m> <port> '<golden50_regex>' arms/full_<m> 4  THEN  bash scripts/grade_arm.sh <m>

HYBRID1_m7_agg2.doc: HYBRID1: M7 for VERY old observations (>12 steps) + AGG2-style obs-clear for medium-old (8-12).

COMBO1_m7_cap5k.doc: COMBO1: M7 (old-obs-elide) + M4 (obs-cap-5k) — compound safe methods.

PROG1_progressive.doc: PROG1: compress more as history grows. Recent 4 obs = full; next 4 = head+tail 2k;

AGG3_recency_obs_4.doc: AGG3: window=4 (very aggressive, likely regresses some).

AGG2_recency_obs_8.doc: AGG2: same as AGG1 but window=8 (more aggressive).

AGG1_recency_obs_12.doc: AGG1: keep system + task + last `window` user/assistant PAIRS; elide middle observations

SUM1_summarize_old.doc: SUM1: for observations older than last `keep_recent` actions, replace long content with

COMP1_tool_compress.doc: COMP1: for ALL tool_result observations, if >2000 chars, keep first 1000 + last 500 + count.

DEDUP2_similar_obs.doc: DEDUP2: if an observation is >90% character-overlap with a previous one (not just exact),

M6_env_log_collapse.doc: M6: collapse a successful build/install/env observation (no error markers,

M7_old_obs_elide.doc: M7: Anthropic context-editing pattern — clear tool observations older than the
